description: Interactive shell service for webOS Terminal

services.name: com.github.gprot42.webosterminal.service
services.description: Interactive shell service for webOS Terminal

commands.name: open
commands.description: Open a subscribed interactive shell session

commands.name: write
commands.description: Write base64-encoded input to a shell session

commands.name: resize
commands.description: Resize the PTY or shell dimensions

commands.name: getCwd
commands.description: Best-effort current working directory for a session

commands.name: status
commands.description: Report whether the shell service is running as root

commands.name: registerUiSession
commands.description: Mark which shell session is displayed in the UI

commands.name: listSessions
commands.description: List active shell sessions for automation

commands.name: run
commands.description: Run a command in the UI shell session
